name: golang-github-henrydcase-nobs-dev
title: golang-github-henrydcase-nobs-dev
summary: NOBS cryptographic primitives library in golang
description:
NOBS cryptographic primitives library in golang
NOBS Cryptographic implementation of quantum-resistant primitives
in Go.
.
Supported cryptographic primitives:
* DH: CSIDH, and SIDH
* Hash: SHA3, SHAKE, and SM3
* KEM: SIKE
